title: More Ores More Gems
description: Added 32 new Metal, 43 new Gems and 2 new Stone. Updated monthly. For Forge and NeoForge
body:
![MOMG](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/a673b493c5d21307138201bd85c1faf6569072a5.png)
# Current version:![118](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/97c89eeb441d5e0b1cf158e2bdabcddea1729f63.png)

<summary>Spoiler</summary>

- Aetherium

### Chondrite
### Uraninite

## Link [CurseForge](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/more-ores-more-gems)
## ⚠️ This mod is incompatible with Optifine ⚠️
## Supported Versions and Modloaders:
### 🛠️ Forge +47.4 : 1.20.1 | 1.19.2 | 1.18.2
### 🦊 NeoForge +21.1 : 1.21.1 | 1.21.4

### You can also play with this mod [Crystalcraft Unlimited](https://modrinth.com/mod/crystalcraft-unlimited)
### Author : RED HUY
### Use [dd/mm/yyyy] for Date
### Upcoming Versions : 1.1.9 (Metal Update 1)
### Current Mod Version : 1.1.8 (Opal Update 2) (19/4/2026)

The goal of this mod: "This mod updates so many minerals that your brain will literally give up and self-destruct. Good luck keeping those two brain cells together."
